common.warning: Warning: Lose these words, lose your wallet. Store them safely!

createWallet.title: Create Wallet
createWallet.description: Create a new wallet to manage your WART tokens

recoverWallet.title: Recover Wallet
recoverWallet.description: Recover a wallet to manage your WART tokens
recoverWallet.errorWalletName: Please enter a valid wallet name

hardware.title: Hardware
hardware.subtitle: Everything on this machine, with the bits that matter for mining called out.
hardware.noGpus: No GPUs were detected by the system.

support.title: Support Warthog
support.subtitle: Warthog is a privacy-first, fairly-launched network. If the project is helpful to you, consider sending a small amount to the development fund — your donation keeps the core team shipping.
support.keepItRunningBody: This address belongs to the Warthog project — not Wartlock. Donations here go directly to the people maintaining the network, its nodes, and its ongoing security work. Any amount helps.
support.donateSubtitle: Pick a wallet, enter an amount, and confirm with your password.
support.recipientLocked: Recipient is locked to the Warthog development fund.
support.thanksDescription: {{amount}} WART is on its way to the Warthog development fund.
support.pickWalletBody: Select which of your wallets the donation should come from.
support.reason1Body: Node operators, audits, and ongoing research into Warthog's proof-of-balanced-work consensus.
support.reason2Body: Wallets, miners, block explorers, and the rest of the tooling around the network stay maintained.
support.reason3Body: Warthog has no VCs and no pre-mine. Community donations are what keep it going.

mining.title: Mining
mining.subtitle: Mine Warthog directly from Wartlock — powered by bzminer.
mining.miningWalletHelp: Block rewards will be paid to this wallet's address.
mining.algoHelp: Warthog uses 'warthog'. Only change if you know what you're doing.
mining.logsEmpty: No logs yet. Click "Start mining" to begin.
mining.downloadHint: Don't have bzminer? Download the latest release from
mining.notConfiguredBody: Point Wartlock at your bzminer binary and select a payout wallet below, then click "Start mining".
mining.launchFailedDescription: Check that the binary path is correct and try again.
mining.binaryInstallHint: Click "Auto-download bzminer" to fetch the release, or pick an existing binary manually.
mining.bzminerVersionHelp: Default is {{default}} — a stable release of the 21.x line with working Warthog support. Type "latest" to pull the newest release, or any real tag (e.g. v21.5.3, v22.0.0, v19.3.1). After changing, click "Update".
mining.downloadFailedDescription: Couldn't fetch bzminer. Check your connection and try again.
mining.sessionDurationHelp: Automatically stop the miner after this many minutes. Leave empty to run until stopped.
mining.donationBody: Optional: dedicate 5 minutes of every hour to the Wartlock developers. Your mining continues normally the other 55 minutes. Nothing is sent or collected — only hashrate is donated. Turn off any time.

eco.label: Eco
eco.description: 2 CPU threads, 2 GB RAM, low GPU load. Laptop stays usable while mining in the background.

balanced.label: Balanced
balanced.description: 8 CPU threads, moderate GPU load. Decent hashrate without saturating the system.

performance.label: Performance
performance.description: Let bzminer use most of your CPU cores. Push the GPU. Expect heat and noise.

custom.label: Custom
custom.description: No preset flags. Set --cpu_threads, --intensity, etc. yourself in Advanced.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize your application preferences
settings.peerUpdated: Your peer has been updated successfully
settings.updateFailed: Your peer has not been updated
settings.privacyWarningBody: Using a public node reveals your wallet address and transaction patterns to the node operator. For maximum privacy, run a Warthog node locally.

importWallet.title: Import wallet
importWallet.byPrivateKeyDescription: Paste a hex-encoded private key to restore a wallet.
importWallet.invalidPrivateKey: Enter a valid 64-character hex private key
importWallet.importedDescription: Your wallet has been imported successfully
importWallet.importFailedDescription: Something went wrong while importing the wallet
importWallet.fromDbFileDescription: Select a Wartlock .db file and enter the password that protects it. Successfully decrypted wallets will be added to this vault.
importWallet.nothingToImport: No decryptable wallets found in this file with that password.
importWallet.importSummary: Decrypted {{decrypted}} of {{total}} wallet(s). Enter a new password to encrypt them in this vault.
importWallet.partialImport: Imported {{imported}} of {{total}} wallets. {{skipped}} were skipped (duplicates or errors).

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Live market data, your portfolio, and every wallet at a glance.
dashboard.peerUnreachableBody: No response from {{peer}}. Balances and transactions won't update until the node is reachable.

receive.exportedDescription: Shareable PNG saved to your Downloads folder.
receive.exportFailedDescription: Couldn't generate the QR PNG. Try again.

transaction.qrDetectedDescription: Recipient filled in from the scanned QR code.
transaction.qrFailedDescription: No readable QR code in that image. Try a sharper picture.
transaction.invalidAmountDescription: Enter a positive amount greater than zero.

wallets.noWallets: No wallets found. Create or recover a wallet to get started.

walletCreated.title: Wallet Created
walletCreated.description: Your wallet has been created successfully

invalidPassword.title: Invalid Password
invalidPassword.description: Password must be at least 8 characters long and contain at least one letter and one number

recoveryError.title: Error
recoveryError.description: An error occurred while recovering wallet

passwordModal.title: Enter Wallet Password
passwordModal.successMessage: You successfully logged in into your wallet
passwordModal.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again
passwordModal.invalidPasswordError: The password you entered is incorrect

walletDetails.title: Wallet Details
walletDetails.transactionSuccess: Your transaction has been sent successfully!
walletDetails.transactionError: Something went wrong while sending the transaction
walletDetails.sendDescription: Send WART to other wallets through Wartlock
walletDetails.receiveDescription: Receive WART tokens to your wallet
